zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain於1746年10月4日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞。她於1765年10月31日與Noadiah Seward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾格蘭維爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1820年7月29日在美國紐約州奧瑟格德卡度享年73歲，埋葬在美國紐約州奧瑟格德卡度 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain于1746年10月4日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞。她于1765年10月31日与Noadiah Seward在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾格蘭維爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1820年7月29日在美国纽约州奧瑟格德卡度享年73岁，埋葬在美国纽约州奧瑟格德卡度 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Swain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Swain, Swein (Old Norse Sveinn, Sven, from sveinn ‘lad’).

English: occupational name from Middle English swein ‘servant, attendant; boy, young man’ (Old Norse sveinn). The word could also denote a swineherd or a peasant in general. The name was thoroughly confused with Swan 1.
Irish: when not the English name, possibly an Anglicized form of Mac Suibhne; see McSwain .

variants.name: Swan
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English swon(e), northern Middle English swan(e) ‘swineherd; peasant; male servant’ (Old English swān). Compare Swain 2, with which this name was thoroughly confused.

English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English swan, swon ‘swan’. In the Middle Ages, the swan was taken as a symbol of false pride, and, according to Chaucer, jealousy. Compare Kite , Nightingale , and Pye .
English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Swan, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Sveinn. Compare Swain 1.

variants.name: Swainson
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Swain (Old Norse Sveinn; see Swain ) + -son. Compare Swanson .
English (northern): patronymic from Middle English swein ‘servant, attendant; boy, young man’ (Old Norse sveinn) + -son.
Americanized form of Swedish Svensson or of its cognate Sveinsson.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.
Lewis and Clark set out from St. Louis, MO to explore the West.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain was born on 4 October 1746, in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States. She married Noadiah Seward on 31 October 1765, in Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 29 July 1820, in Decatur, Otsego, New York, United States, at the age of 73, and was buried in Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain est née le 4 octobre 1746, à Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Elle a épousé Noadiah Seward le 31 octobre 1765, à Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 juillet 1820, à Decatur, Otsego, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain è nata il il 4 ottobre 1746 nel Filadelfia, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Lei sposato Noadiah Seward il 31 ottobre 1765, nel Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 luglio 1820, nel Decatur, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Swainは1746年10月4日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアで生まれた。1765年10月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアグランヴィルでNoadiah Sewardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1820年7月29日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴデカトゥルで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴデカトゥル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 그랜빌
ko.Decatur Cemetery,Decatur,Otsego County,N: 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 데카투르 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain(은)는 1746년 10월 4일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1765년 10월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 그랜빌에서 Noadiah Seward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1820년 7월 29일 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 데카투르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 데카투르 세멧리에 묻혔다.

Granville, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain nasceu em 4 de outubro de 1746, em Filadélfia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Ela casou-se com Noadiah Seward em 31 de outubro de 1765, em Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de julho de 1820, em Decatur, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Decatur Cemetery,Decatur,Otsego County,N: декатур кеметири, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain родилась 4 октября 1746 г. в местности филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Noadiah Seward 31 октября 1765 г. в местности гранвилл, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 29 июля 1820 г. в местности декатур, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности декатур кеметири, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Sarah Swain nació el 4 de octubre de 1746, en Filadelfia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Se casó con Noadiah Seward el 31 de octubre de 1765, en Granville, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de julio de 1820, en Decatur, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Decatur Cemetery, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
